business.return_policy: Not applicable for banking services. Card replacement and charge dispute flows apply per policy.
business.refund_policy: Erroneous charges are reversed after verification as per banking regulations.
business.shipping_policy: Debit and credit cards are delivered within 5 to 7 business days.
business.warranty_policy: Card and device token support as per bank service policy.
business.business_hours: 24x7 for card blocking and fraud reporting; general support Mon-Sat 8AM-10PM IST
business.sla_response_time: Critical fraud issues within 15 minutes; general queries within 4 hours

faq.q: How do I block my card immediately?
faq.a: Use the mobile app card controls or call emergency support to block your card instantly.

faq.q: How do I raise a charge dispute?
faq.a: Share transaction date, amount, merchant name, and last 4 digits of card. We will register a dispute ticket.

faq.q: I forgot my UPI PIN. What should I do?
faq.a: Use the app UPI settings to reset PIN with debit card verification. Never share OTP or PIN with anyone.

business.greeting: Welcome to Rio Bank Customer Care. I am here to help you with your banking issue.
business.redirect_message: I can help only with Rio Bank customer support topics. For other questions, please contact the appropriate department.

tier_rules.tier_0: Self-serve FAQs for simple information requests.
tier_rules.tier_1: Agent handles account, card, and transaction support with ticket creation.
tier_rules.tier_2: Escalate to specialist for unresolved disputes, KYC lockouts, or repeated transaction failures.
tier_rules.tier_3: Escalate to fraud/risk or core banking engineering for confirmed incidents or outages.
